attributes.action: Prosecute any politicians who lie or do not follow through on their manifesto
attributes.additional_details:
For far too long the English public have relied on politicians to be transparent, trustworthy and in it for their constituencies and the common people, however, unfortunately this simply is not the case.

Politicians create manifesto's to gain the support and votes of the English people and yet rarely if ever carry through their promises outlined in their manifesto, this needs to stop and we need to hold politicians accountable.
attributes.background: We want politicians to be held accountable for lieing or not following through on their manifesto, we want England to fall in line with Wales on this matter

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Make the government legally accountable for delivering its manifesto promises'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749381
